hero.title: About ThaiViet Ltd
hero.subtitle: Mastering the art of surface finish across the Wellington region.

Quality interior & exterior painting, plastering, wallpapering, cedar staining and decorating — backed by a 5-year workmanship guarantee. Proudly serving Wellington, Lower Hutt, Upper Hutt, Porirua, Kāpiti Coast & Wairarapa since 2008.

intro.title: Wellington's Premier Painting Company.
intro.body: As a Registered Master Painter and Eco-Decorator, Thai Viet brings years of hands-on experience transforming homes and businesses across Wellington. From interior and exterior painting to plastering, cedar staining, wallpapering, and water blasting — no job is too big or too small. We treat every home as if it were our own.
intro.testimonialQuote: The quality of finish exceeded our expectations. Highly recommend ThaiViet.

services.title: Our Services
services.ctaText: Contact our team to discuss your specific project needs.

cards.title: Interior Painting
cards.desc: Premium interior wall and ceiling painting for every room of the house.

cards.title: Exterior Painting
cards.desc: Long-lasting exterior coatings built to handle New Zealand weather.

cards.title: Roof Painting
cards.desc: Restore and protect your roof with weather-resistant coatings.

cards.title: Paint Stripping
cards.desc: Strip old layers down to a clean, paint-ready surface.

cards.title: Plastering & GIB Stopping
cards.desc: Smooth, level walls and crisp GIB stopping ready for a flawless finish.

cards.title: Wood Staining
cards.desc: Bring out the natural grain of timber while protecting it from the elements.

cards.title: Building Work
cards.desc: Minor carpentry, repairs, and prep work to get your project ready for paint.

cards.title: Flooring
cards.desc: Floor sanding and varnishing to bring tired timber floors back to a smooth, durable finish.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Our Painters in Wellington?
whyChoose.intro: Quality workmanship, transparent pricing, and dependable service from start to finish. Our accredited painting professionals deliver exceptional results across the Wellington region, keeping you informed every step of the way—from the initial quote to the final coat.
whyChoose.subtitle: What sets us apart
bullets: Clear, upfront pricing with no hidden costs
Trusted service throughout the Wellington region
whyChoose.closing: Whether you're refreshing a single room or repainting an entire property, our team is committed to delivering a smooth, professional experience and results you can be proud of.

process.title: Our Simple Process
process.subtitle: How we take your project from initial vision to final completion.

steps.title: Enquiry
steps.desc: Send us your details online or call us directly.

steps.title: Site Visit
steps.desc: We visit your property for a thorough assessment.

steps.title: Detailed Quote
steps.desc: You receive a clear, comprehensive fixed-price quote.

steps.title: Preparation
steps.desc: Surface prep begins—the key to a great finish.

steps.title: Painting
steps.desc: Our craftsmen apply premium coats of paint.

items.quote: ThaiViet recently completed the painting for our new house in Plimmerton. The professionalism was outstanding — the attention to detail in the plastering and the crispness of the paint lines made all the difference.
items.name: Peter Mathews

items.quote: Thai and his team repainted the exterior of our 1920s villa in Karori. They prepped meticulously, kept the worksite tidy every day, and finished bang on schedule. Couldn't be happier.
items.name: Sarah Roberts

items.quote: We had ThaiViet repaint our office over a long weekend so we could open Monday morning with no downtime. Quote was clear, the work was tidy, and they came back to touch up two small spots without any fuss.
items.name: James Liu

items.quote: Booked Thai for a full interior repaint of our Lower Hutt home. Quote was honest, the team turned up on time every day, and the finish is flawless. Highly recommend.
items.name: Hannah Williams

items.quote: Cedar staining job on our deck and pergola in Whitby. Excellent prep work, careful around our garden, and the colour match was spot on. Will use them again.
items.name: David Chen

serviceAreas.title: Service Areas
serviceAreas.intro: Based in Porirua, we proudly serve the wider Wellington region with premium painting, plastering, and decorating for residential and commercial clients:

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Space?
cta.subtitle: Contact us today for a free, no-obligation consultation and quote for your next project.

paragraphs: As a Registered Master Painter and Eco-Decorator with multiple years of experience under his tool belt, Thai and his team have been transforming homes and businesses across the Wellington region.

As the owner of ThaiViet Ltd, Thai leads a large team of tradesmen offering interior and exterior painting, plastering, cedar staining, wallpapering, water blasting, spray painting, and property maintenance. We stay true to our slogan: "Your home. Our Care." — treating every house as if it were our own.
heritage.quote: Quality is not an act, it is a habit.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: With customer satisfaction as our highest priority, we aim to provide a service that exceeds your expectations every time.

cards.title: Artisan Painting
cards.desc: Interior, exterior, and roof painting using premium coatings designed for Wellington's coastal conditions.

cards.title: Master Wallpapering
cards.desc: Seamless pattern matching and bubble-free installation for luxury interiors.

cards.title: Total Solutions
cards.desc: Comprehensive maintenance that safeguards your investment for decades to come.

people.title: Highly Skilled Professionals
paragraphs: Our large team of tradesmen put the customer's needs first and work efficiently towards their deadlines. They arrive on site on time every morning, are friendly, professional, and respectful of your living environment.

We take pride in our punctuality, professional conduct, and the respectful way we treat your space. If you have any questions about the calibre of our work, we can provide you with a list of referees to get in touch with.

preparation.title: Our Commitment to Preparation
preparation.intro: A great finish is 90% preparation. We don't cut corners; we sand them, prime them, and ensure the foundation is perfect before a single drop of paint is applied.

items.label: Referral Rate
items.desc: Our business thrives on word-of-mouth excellence.

items.label: Years Serving Wellington
items.desc: Deep local knowledge of the capital's unique builds.

items.label: Satisfaction Guarantee
items.desc: We don't leave until you're absolutely delighted.

items.label: Painter Network
items.desc: Trusted by the city's leading architects.

posts.title: How to Choose the Right Paint Colour for Every Room
posts.excerpt: Picking the perfect colour can be overwhelming. Our experts break down how lighting, room size, and mood all play a role in your final choice.

posts.title: Why Surface Preparation is the Secret to a Lasting Paint Job
posts.excerpt: Most paint failures come down to poor prep work. Learn what professional painters do before a single drop of paint is applied.

posts.title: Best Time of Year to Paint Your Home's Exterior in Wellington
posts.excerpt: Wellington's weather can be unpredictable. Here's when to schedule your exterior paint job for best adhesion and durability.

posts.title: Low-VOC & Eco-Friendly Paints: Are They Worth It?
posts.excerpt: As a registered Eco-Decorator, we understand the benefits of low-VOC paints for your family's health and the environment.

posts.title: Minimising Business Disruption During a Commercial Repaint
posts.excerpt: Repainting your business premises doesn't have to halt operations. Our staged approach keeps your team and customers comfortable.

posts.title: 2024 Wallpaper Trends Taking Over New Zealand Homes
